articles.title: The Way of Parents
articles.author: Strickland Gillilan
articles.notes: This appears to be content from 'The Way of Parents' by Strickland Gillilan listed in the table of contents on page 507. The poetic format and inspirational message about parental guidance fits the expected content for this author and title.

misc_summary: The remaining content consists of legitimate misc material: table of contents, publication information (organ details, subscription rates), advertisements for colleges, businesses, and products, and bound volume sales information. There's also a fragment 'I have an idea that the fate of the vampire depends on me' which appears to be from fiction but is too brief and out of context to extract as a standalone piece.
